generated_oml:
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for depth perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring ego vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor measuring steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
]

instance IntelDepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance HokuyoLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted over ROS2"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance IntelDepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth perception data from Intel D435i"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDepthCameraDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpackSDK
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpackSDK
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing vehicle state and object track timeseries data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant adaptive cruise control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpackSDK
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration on Jetson devices"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for real-time communication between physical and virtual systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, ACCComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for rapid prototyping of digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for node lifecycle management in ROS2"
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for storing data in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of vehicle state and object tracks, including visualization and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight, ObjectTrackingReportInsight
]

instance ACCComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading adaptive cruise control logic computation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDecisionInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management of ACC, speed, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of vehicle state and environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight
]

instance VehicleStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state for transparency"
]

instance ObjectTrackingReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series reports of object tracks for performance analysis"
]

instance ACCDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Adaptive cruise control decisions based on lead vehicle detection"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable adaptive cruise control remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable adaptive cruise control remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for vehicle steering actuation"
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "DC motor for vehicle propulsion"
]

instance VedderESC : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller converting speed commands to motor voltage signals"
]

instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle digital twin environment based on ISO 23247 reference architecture"
    base:contains SteeringServo, Motor, VedderESC, HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Transmission of ACC control commands (desired speed, emergency braking, enable/disable) from the digital twin to the physical vehicle's motor and steering actuators via ROS2, converting digital commands into motor voltage signals."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end network latency ≤100 ms (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms across all components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Entity-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (on vehicle), Digital Twin Entity (cloud), User Entity (remote UI), and Cross-System Data Translation FE; components communicate via ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), used for real-time monitoring, optimization, and remote management of the adaptive cruise control system during vehicle operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implemented per ISO 15622 performance class I (no road curvature capabilities); real-time constraints enforced via 100 ms latency and clock sync; simplified model for 1/10-scale vehicle."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with ≤100 ms end-to-end latency as per 3GPP TS 22.185."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on NVIDIA Jetson hardware (vehicle), Digital Twin Entity and Data Storage in cloud infrastructure, User Entity on remote devices."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for digital twin framework, ISO 15622 for adaptive cruise control functionality."
]
